arts.ttl: Endrick drops Real Madrid exit hint as Brazil star opens up on World Cup fears
arts.sum: Brazil international Endrick reveals he fears his lack of playing time at Real Madrid could cost him a place at next year's World Cup squad.

arts.ttl: Argentina vs Brazil: Preview, predictions and lineups
arts.sum: Argentina face eternal rivals Brazil in qualifying for the 2026 World Cup. Preview includes team news, predicted lineups, how to watch on TV and more.

arts.ttl: Angel di Maria’s Response to Raphinha’s X-Rated Argentina Dig Goes Viral
arts.sum: Brazil head to Argentina in World Cup qualifying this week and Barcelona star Raphinha decided to light a fire under the opposition in the build-up.

arts.ttl: Brazil predicts end to winless run in Argentina in World Cup qualifier
arts.sum: That didn’t put off Brazil striker Raphinha, who kicked off the hostilities on Monday by promising to score against the World Cup holder in Buenos Aires on Tuesday in a 2026 qualifier. Argentina, leading South America, can clinch a World Cup berth by drawing with third-placed Brazil with four rounds to spare.

arts.ttl: Endrick hints at Real Madrid exit as Brazil starlet fears missing out on World Cup after season of sitting behind Kylian Mbappe in pecking order
arts.sum: Endrick has opened the door for potential suitors by hinting he is keen to leave Real Madrid to ensure he makes Brazil's 2026 World Cup squad. The forward is yet to start a La Liga match.

arts.ttl: Report: Andre Onana’s future on ropes as Man United enquire for young new goalkeeper
arts.sum: Manchester United have ramped up their efforts to sign Burnley goalkeeper James Trafford, making him a key target for the upcoming summer transfer window. The Red Devils are actively pursuing reinforcements between the sticks, and Trafford has emerged as a serious contender to challenge Andre Onana for the No.1 spot next season. arts.ttl: Brazil's Dorival, Ancelotti discuss Endrick progress
arts.sum: Brazil coach Dorival Júnior has revealed he has had a long talk with Real Madrid coach Carlo Ancelotti regarding Endrick's progress.

arts.ttl: Endrick hints at Real Madrid exit to keep World Cup dream alive
arts.sum: Endrick has hinted he could look to leave Real Madrid as the forward looks to keep his World Cup dream alive. The teenager signed for Real Madrid from Palmeiras in a €60m deal last summer but has struggled for first-team football. arts.ttl: Raphinha delivers fiery x-rated two-word message to Argentina - as Brazil star makes vow in absence of rival Lionel Messi
arts.sum: The Barcelona man is in contention for the Ballon d'Or amid a breathtaking season which has seen him score 27 goals and set up a further 20.
